items.title: Tesla just increased its spending plan to $25B — here’s where the money is going
items.summary: Tesla's planned capex for 2026 is three times higher than what the company has historically spent. Its CFO said, as a result, Tesla will have a negative free cash flow the rest of the year.

items.title: Google updates Workspace to make AI your new office intern
items.summary: Google has introduced a host of new automated functions into Workspace, all of which are driven by Workspace Intelligence, its new AI system.

items.title: Hands on with X’s new AI-powered custom feeds
items.summary: X's AI-powered custom timelines are replacing Communities, with Grok-curated feeds...and new ad slots.

items.title: How SpaceX preempted a $2B fundraise with a $60B buyout offer
items.summary: Cursor was on track to close a $2 billion funding round this week but chose to halt discussions after SpaceX offered a $10 billion "collaboration fee" and a path to a $60 billion acquisition.

items.title: Google Cloud launches two new AI chips to compete with Nvidia
items.summary: Google's newest TPUs are faster and cheaper than the previous versions. But the company is still embracing Nvidia in its cloud — for now.

items.title: Google turns Chrome into an AI co-worker for the workplace
items.summary: Google brings Gemini-powered "auto browse" capabilities to Chrome for enterprise users, letting workers automate tasks like research, data entry, and more.

items.title: Google makes an interesting choice with its new agent-building tool for enterprises
items.summary: Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform takes an interesting approach: It is geared for IT and technical users.

items.title: AI Overviews are coming to your Gmail at work
items.summary: The AI Overviews will offer instant summaries pulled from across multiple emails.

items.title: Gemma 4 VLA Demo on Jetson Orin Nano Super
items.summary: Gemma 4 VLA Demo on Jetson Orin Nano Super

items.title: Making ChatGPT better for clinicians
items.summary: OpenAI makes ChatGPT for Clinicians free for verified U.S. physicians, nurse practitioners, and pharmacists, supporting clinical care, documentation, and research.

items.title: OpenAI teams up with Infosys to bring AI tools to more businesses
items.summary: Infosys said the integration will be used to help its clients modernize software development, automate workflows, and deploy AI systems, initially focusing software engineering, legacy modernization, and DevOps.

items.title: AI is spitting out more potential drugs than ever. This startup wants to figure out which ones matter.
items.summary: 10x Science has raised a $4.8 million seed round to help pharmaceutical researchers understand complex molecules.

items.title: We're launching two specialized TPUs for the agentic era.
items.summary: The eighth generation of Google’s TPU includes two specialized chips that will power the future of AI.

items.title: Exclusive: Google deepens Thinking Machines Lab ties with new multibillion-dollar deal
items.summary: Mira Murati's Thinking Machines Lab has signed a multibillion-dollar deal with Google Cloud for AI infrastructure powered by Nvidia's latest GB300 chips, TechCrunch has exclusively learned.

items.title: Google Maps is about to get a big dose of AI
items.summary: The new features, announced at Cloud Next in Las Vegas this week, add generative AI capabilities to Google's mapping platform, giving it enhanced visual and data analytics powers.

items.title: The most interesting startups showcased at Google Cloud Next 2026
items.summary: Google wants AI startups on its cloud and has showcased a long list of them at its annual conference.

items.title: AI needs a strong data fabric to deliver business value
items.summary: Artificial intelligence is moving quickly in the enterprise, from experimentation to everyday use. Organizations are deploying copilots, agents, and predictive systems across finance, supply chains, human resources, and…

items.title: Introducing workspace agents in ChatGPT
items.summary: Workspace agents in ChatGPT are Codex-powered agents that automate complex workflows, run in the cloud, and help teams scale work across tools securely.

items.title: Speeding up agentic workflows with WebSockets in the Responses API
items.summary: A deep dive into the Codex agent loop, showing how WebSockets and connection-scoped caching reduced API overhead and improved model latency.

items.title: Workspace agents
items.summary: Learn how to build, use, and scale workspace agents in ChatGPT to automate repeatable workflows, connect tools, and streamline team operations.

items.title: Introducing OpenAI Privacy Filter
items.summary: OpenAI Privacy Filter is an open-weight model for detecting and redacting personally identifiable information (PII) in text with state-of-the-art accuracy
